name: Potassium Phosphate
executiveSummary: IV phosphorus replacement in severe ICU hypophosphatemia and refeeding syndrome.
indications:
## Indications

- Hypophosphatemia < 1 mg/dL or symptomatic in the ICU.
- Refeeding syndrome.

## Precautions

- Secondary hypocalcemia. Do not administer as a rapid bolus. Monitor Ca2+ and K+.

> Adjust per institutional protocol and medical prescription.

adulto.presentation: Potassium/sodium phosphate ampoule according to formulation.

neonatal.dose: Replacement according to levels in NICU.

stability:
## Stability

- Verify compatibility with parenteral nutrition.

bibliography.citation: American Heart Association. ACLS / PALS / NRP Guidelines.
ANMAT. Drug information and authorized prescribing information in Argentina.
Society of Critical Care Medicine (SCCM). ICU medication guidelines.
American Academy of Pediatrics. Medication guidance in critical care.
